parameters.query: SELECT id, titulo, prioridad, tipo_tarea FROM core.tasks WHERE estado IN ('todo', 'in_progress') ORDER BY case prioridad when 'alta' then 1 when 'media' then 2 else 3 end ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT 3;

SELECT id, titulo, prioridad, tipo_tarea FROM core.tasks WHERE estado IN ('todo', 'in_progress') ORDER BY case prioridad when 'alta' then 1 when 'media' then 2 else 3 end ASC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.inlineKeyboard: ={{ $json.task_id ? { rows: [ { row: { buttons: [ { text: '✅ Misión Cumplida', callback_data: 'done_task:' + $json.task_id } ] } } ] } : {} }}
